evals.name: full-app-audit
evals.prompt: I want you to review the AutoAI app and tell me everything that needs fixing. Be thorough but only flag real issues with file paths.
evals.expected_output: A structured code review of the whole app, organized into the four categories defined by the skill (Architecture, State Management, Lifecycle & Memory, Performance & Stability), with file:line citations and a confirmed-healthy section.

evals.name: costs-feature-scoped
evals.prompt: Quick audit on the costs feature — anything broken or sketchy?
evals.expected_output: A review scoped to the costs feature only (no findings from unrelated features), still organized by the four categories.

evals.name: garage-indirect-trigger
evals.prompt: I just finished the garage feature with edit and delete. Look it over and tell me if there's anything I should clean up before moving on.
evals.expected_output: A scoped review of the garage feature triggered by an indirect 'look it over' phrasing — output should still follow the skill's four-category structure.
